name: Snapdeal BOBCARD
exclusions: fuel transactions eligible for surcharge waiver do not earn reward points
Snapdeal cashback applies on eligible Snapdeal website and app purchases
taxes and charges excluded as per BOBCARD terms
milestoneBenefits: Shopping vouchers worth up to Rs 500 on card usage within first 30 days of issuance
additionalBenefits: Reward points are auto-credited as cashback to the monthly statement
1% fuel surcharge waiver on fuel transactions between Rs 400 and Rs 5,000, capped at Rs 250 per month

salaried: Annual income of Rs 3.6 lakh or more
selfEmployed: Annual income of Rs 4.8 lakh or more

internalNotes: Rechecked the historical official Snapdeal BOBCARD source URL on 2026-06-14; the product page was not publicly retrievable during this audit.
Retained the prior official reward, fee, and eligibility mapping pending an updated issuer-hosted replacement page or current MITC link.
The card's reward points are modeled as cashback because the issuer language historically stated that accrued points are auto-credited against the monthly statement.
